title: BMNU, UUUG: Big ETF Inflows
content:
Comparing units outstanding versus one week ago at the coverage universe of ETFs at ETF Channel, the biggest inflow was seen in the BMNU ETF, which added 18,520,000 units, or a 18.8% increase week over week.

And on a percentage change basis, the ETF with the biggest increase in inflows was the UUUG ETF, which added 255,000 units, for a 38.3% increase in outstanding units.

VIDEO: BMNU, UUUG: Big ETF Inflows
